name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
currentFocus: Session 76 is closed out: the website now has shared browser-local micro-feedback, feedback-aware public-safe intelligence/trust surfaces, adaptive hesitation-aware personalization, and a scoped release-confidence gate that passes across local preview, live headers, and staging. The remaining focus is broader browser-suite stability and a deeper proof/objection-handling pass on the core conversion pages.
nextMilestone: Stabilize the broader local browser suite, run the premium proof/depth pass on homepage + membership + VaultSparked, and keep annual activation parked behind the missing Stripe yearly plan keys.
blockers: CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN missing, so Worker deploys still require local Wrangler auth
Annual Stripe plan keys still do not exist, so annual checkout remains an honest preview only
The broader local browser suite still shows some first-attempt flaky timeouts under heavier parallel Chromium load
